highlights: Implements El Escorial criteria scoring and differential analysis against multiple ALS mimics.
Integrates clinical test workflows with evidence lookup and structured diagnostic reporting.
Designed as a clinician-facing decision-support flow, not a black-box prediction widget.
impact: Improved diagnostic workflow consistency and reduced manual synthesis burden during ALS-vs-mimic evaluations.
one_liner: Clinical decision-support workflow that helps neurologists differentiate ALS from look-alike conditions.
problem: ALS workups require synthesizing many test streams and mimic conditions under high uncertainty and time pressure.
solution: Built a structured diagnostic system combining test interpretation, criteria scoring, and research-backed differential workflows.
title: ALS Clarity
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
